title: Prose sweep — every skill instruction routes mutations through the CLIs
action: Grep-driven sweep: find every instruction that tells an agent to hand-edit .bee/state.json or append to .bee/backlog.jsonl (grep -rn 'state.json' skills/*/SKILL.md skills/bee-hive/templates/AGENTS.block.md; grep -rn 'backlog.jsonl' likewise). Replace each mutation instruction with the exact CLI call using the final verb/flag names from cells 1-2 (e.g. bee-planning §6 state update -> node .bee/bin/bee_state.mjs set --phase validated ...; bee-scribing last_scribing_run -> bee_state.mjs scribing-run; bee-compounding/bee-grooming backlog appends -> bee_backlog.mjs add). Read-only mentions stay. Add one standing rule to bee-hive SKILL.md's contracts section: 'Never hand-edit .bee/*.json(l). A mutation with no CLI verb is filed as friction via bee_backlog.mjs add, then (only then) edited by hand.' The files list here names the two known-fixed anchors; the grep defines the true scope — list every file actually touched in the cell trace.

truths: No SKILL.md or AGENTS.block.md line instructs writing/updating state.json or backlog.jsonl without the CLI
Every replacement cites a verb/flag that actually exists in the shipped CLIs

artifacts.substantive: standing no-hand-edit rule in the contracts section

key_links: Replacements match the final CLI surface of cli-mutations-1 and -2 exactly
prohibitions: Do not change gate semantics or skill flow while rewording
Do not touch .bee/ vendored files in this cell

verify: ! grep -rniE '(update|write|record|append|edit)[^.]{0,60}\.bee/(state\.json|backlog\.jsonl)' skills/*/SKILL.md skills/bee-hive/templates/AGENTS.block.md | grep -vE 'bee_state\.mjs|bee_backlog\.mjs' && grep -q 'Never hand-edit' skills/bee-hive/SKILL.md

trace.outcome: Grep-driven prose sweep: replaced all 9 hand-edit mutation instructions (state.json: bypass-gate, compounding, exploring, swarming, planning, scribing, reviewing x2, validating; backlog.jsonl: reviewing, compounding, grooming) with the exact bee_state.mjs/bee_backlog.mjs CLI calls using cli-mutations-1/-2's final verb/flag names, and added the standing 'Never hand-edit .bee/*.json(l)' rule to bee-hive SKILL.md's Priority Rules (hive law). Read-only mentions (14 remaining state.json/backlog.jsonl hits) left untouched.
trace.verification_evidence:
{
  "tests_inspected": ["cell verify: grep -rniE mutation-instruction anti-pattern over skills/*/SKILL.md + AGENTS.block.md"],
  "tests_added_or_changed": [],
  "red_failure_evidence": "Before the change, the cell's own verify grep matched 9 lines instructing a hand-edit with no CLI verb, e.g. skills/bee-validating/SKILL.md:82 (git show HEAD): \"On approval, update `.bee/state.json`: set `approved_gates.execution: true`, `phase: \\\"validated\\\"`, `summary`, and `next_action: ...`\" and skills/bee-swarming/SKILL.md:41: \"5. **Record workers** (nickname, cell id, tier, status) in `.bee/state.json` `workers` before results arrive.\" Neither cites bee_state.mjs, so the verify's `grep -v 'bee_state\\.mjs|bee_backlog\\.mjs'` filter would not have removed them and the overall `!grep ...` check would have failed (non-zero grep match -> negated to failure).",
  "verification_run": "(! grep -rniE '(update|write|record|append|edit)[^.]{0,60}\\.bee/(state\\.json|backlog\\.jsonl)' skills/*/SKILL.md skills/bee-hive/templates/AGENTS.block.md | grep -vE 'bee_state\\.mjs|bee_backlog\\.mjs') && grep -q 'Never hand-edit' skills/bee-hive/SKILL.md -> exit 0 (no anti-pattern matches; standing rule present)",
  "deliberate_exceptions": ["skills/bee-hive/templates/AGENTS.block.md was reserved and grepped per the cell's scope but required no edit: its four state.json mentions are all read-only/descriptive (file-listing table, red-flags prose, session-finish 'leave consistent' line), none instruct a hand-edit with a specific field set, so none matched the anti-pattern.", "skills/bee-validating/SKILL.md:84 ('set `approved_gates.execution: true` yourself' in the bypass path) was left unchanged — it does not literally mention `.bee/state.json` so it falls outside the grep-defined scope (`grep -rn 'state.json' ...`), and the plan's prohibition against changing gate semantics/skill flow argues for the narrowest safe edit."]
}
trace.verify_output: Both grep checks exit 0: no unconverted mutation instructions remain, and the standing no-hand-edit rule is present in bee-hive SKILL.md's Priority Rules (hive law) section.
trace.verify_command: (! grep -rniE "(update|write|record|append|edit)[^.]{0,60}\.bee/(state\.json|backlog\.jsonl)" skills/*/SKILL.md skills/bee-hive/templates/AGENTS.block.md | grep -vE "bee_state\.mjs|bee_backlog\.mjs") && grep -q "Never hand-edit" skills/bee-hive/SKILL.md
